evidence: src/app/api/forms/volunteer-survey/submit/route.ts:73 fetches https://api.resend.com/emails with from = surveys@rmgreatdane.org (RESEND_FROM_EMAIL env-overridable). Triggered by /api/forms/volunteer-survey/submit when RESEND_API_KEY is set.

evidence: Legacy SPF mechanism ip4:75.103.66.18 reverse-DNSes to cloudwebx16.newtekwebhosting.com; ip4:75.103.66.54 reverse-DNSes to sharedwebx102.newtekwebhosting.com. Production website cutover migrated off Newtek to Vercel. No code path in current repo references Newtek/IPM mail.

evidence: No Vercel transactional email integration in repo. Vercel itself does not send mail on behalf of customer apps.

@supabase/supabase-js used for data; no explicit auth email-template configuration in repo. Supabase Auth can send password reset / magic-link emails from a Supabase-managed sender (not the customer domain) by default. If Lori has configured a custom SMTP relay in Supabase project settings to send as @rmgreatdane.org, that becomes a sender.
required_spf_mechanism: depends — none if default Supabase sender; otherwise depends on the SMTP provider Lori configured
notes: Requires Lori check in Supabase dashboard → Project Settings → Auth → Email → SMTP Settings.

evidence: Site redirects /apply/adopt and footer links to https://form.jotform.com/RMGDRI/adoption-foster-application. Jotform sends notifications from its own infra by default (noreply@jotform.com / forms-mail.jotform.com). Jotform offers "Send Email From Custom SMTP" or "Reply-To" address customization which could place @rmgreatdane.org in the From header.
required_spf_mechanism: depends — none if default Jotform sender; include:jotform's documented sender block if configured
notes: Requires Lori check in Jotform → Form Settings → Email Notifications → Sender Email.

evidence: No payment integration visible in current repo (no Stripe/Paypal/Donorbox SDK). Lori may use an external donation page that sends thank-you receipts as @rmgreatdane.org.

evidence: No newsletter SDK or list management code in repo. RMGDRI may use Mailchimp / Constant Contact / Mailerlite / etc. externally.

Personal Gmail accounts send as user@gmail.com, not @rmgreatdane.org. Even with "Send mail as" Gmail aliasing pointing at @rmgreatdane.org, that requires SMTP relay configuration (typically Google Workspace's relay, already covered).

notes: If anyone uses Gmail "Send mail as" with smtp-relay.gmail.com, that's still authorized by include:_spf.google.com.
